name: @project-ai/triumvirate-portal
description: The Triumvirate manifesto portal for Project-AI — three pillars: Project AI Cognitive Engine (packages/companion + packages/kernel), Cerberus Security Fortress (packages/cerberus + packages/security), Codex Deus Maximus Knowledge Repository (packages/audit + packages/canonical + packages/tarl). Runtime governance via packages/governance/triumvirate.py TriumvirateGovernor.

scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run test:integration
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && npm run serve
